name: set_renderer_color
description: Set the color of a GameObject's Renderer (works with MeshRenderer and SkinnedMeshRenderer). This will find or create a flat color material using the 'Universal Render Pipeline/Lit' shader in 'Assets/Materials/FlatColor/' and assign it to the renderer. Materials are named 'M_FlatColor_{color_name}' and reused when the same color is requested.

game_object_name.description: The name of the GameObject whose Renderer color to set.

color_name.description: A human-readable color name used for the material asset name, e.g. 'Red', 'Blue', 'DarkGreen', 'BrightYellow'. Use PascalCase with no spaces.

a.description: Alpha channel value (0.0 to 1.0). Default 1.0 (fully opaque).
